_meta.source: Port pin from published coordinates for Eastport, Maine (44.9033N, 67.0033W), on Moose Island in Passamaquoddy Bay. Bbox is an approximate hint around Moose Island; POI lat/lons not yet individually sourced — poi_ids intentionally empty pending on-site GPS.

bbox_hint.note: Eastport sits on Moose Island in Passamaquoddy Bay, far Down East Maine, at the New Brunswick (Canada) border. The tender landing and historic Water Street downtown are on the eastern shore; Dog Island (Old Sow viewpoint) is at the north tip; Shackford Head State Park is on the southern headland. Coordinates approximate.
